summary.summary: The Xcode project file Trio.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj was modified to add a sourceTree entry for the BolusSafety group: a line 'sourceTree = "<group>";' was inserted into the PBXGroup definition for BolusSafety. This change is in commit:c64c38597907a08d27f4cb64bd5ceed3b317eeda and is shown in the diff (diff:774004941fd7) of the file Trio.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj (file:2e9807665cbe).
summary.userFacingImpact: This is a project configuration change (Trio.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj) that adjusts a PBXGroup property; there is no evidence in the supplied sources of any runtime or algorithmic code changes. The commit subject indicates it was intended to 'fix build error' (commit:c64c38597907a08d27f4cb64bd5ceed3b317eeda), but the supplied data does not prove the build was successfully fixed—human review and verification of the build/CI is recommended (see diff:774004941fd7 and file:2e9807665cbe).
